chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D-1467 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 6196/23 3.For orders on CMA 6197/23 4.For hearing of main case 30-11-2023 None present for the petitioner. ***** On the last date of hearing i.e. 12.10.2023, learned counsel for petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of this petition, but today he has chosen to remain absent without any intimation. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
